en_title: Disney Layoffs Hit Hundreds of Staff, With Pixar Cuts Reportedly in Part Due to Underperformance of Hoppers
cn_title: 迪士尼裁数百人 皮克斯再受创或因《Hoppers》失利
subtitle: 原创电影表现持续承压

paragraphs.en: Disney has today laid off hundreds of staff, with workers at Toy Story and Inside Out animation studio Pixar particularly impacted.
paragraphs.cn: 迪士尼今日裁减数百名员工，制作《玩具总动员》和《头脑特工队》的动画工作室皮克斯尤其受到冲击。

paragraphs.en: That's according to a new report from TheWrap , which includes official confirmation of the job losses from a Disney spokesperson. Employees hit by redundancies also include those within the company's Disney Studios and Television divisions and corporate functions.
paragraphs.cn: TheWrap最新报道披露了这一消息，并获得迪士尼发言人对裁员的正式确认。受影响员工还包括迪士尼影业、电视部门以及公司职能团队人员。

paragraphs.en: "These changes are part of our continual evaluation of how we manage resources and reinvest across the company as our industry continues to evolve," a Disney spokesperson told The Wrap.
paragraphs.cn: 迪士尼发言人告诉TheWrap：「随着行业持续演变，这些调整是我们不断评估如何管理资源并在全公司范围重新投资的一部分。」

paragraphs.en: The exact number of impacted employees has not yet been confirmed, but these losses are reportedly the largest round of layoffs at Pixar since 2024, when the company shed 14 percent of staff (around 175 employees) in reaction to a slowdown in content for streaming platform Disney+.
paragraphs.cn: 受影响员工的确切人数尚未确认，但据报这是皮克斯自2024年以来规模最大的一轮裁员。当年，由于流媒体平台Disney+内容产量放缓，公司裁掉14 percent，即14%的员工，约175人。

paragraphs.en: Two years later, these latest cuts are being blamed on Pixar's mixed performance in recent years — with original movies (not part of existing franchises) particularly struggling.
paragraphs.cn: 两年后，这轮最新裁员被归因于皮克斯近年表现好坏参半，尤其是非现有系列的原创电影举步维艰。

paragraphs.en: While Toy Story 5 is now nearing a billion dollars at the box office, Pixar's previous release Hoppers struggled to break even. This came on the back of 2025 launch Elio, another original movie, which flopped hard — handing Pixar its lowest theatrical opening weekend ever.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《玩具总动员5》全球票房正逼近10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)，皮克斯上一部作品《Hoppers》却难以实现收支平衡。此前，2025年上映的另一部原创电影《地球特派员》也遭遇惨败，创下皮克斯史上最低院线开画周末成绩。

paragraphs.en: TheWrap said the layoffs at Pixar are "partially" being blamed on the relative underperformance of Hoppers, which made $389.5 million globally against a $150 million production budget. TheWrap said that was just shy of breaking even.
paragraphs.cn: TheWrap称，皮克斯裁员「部分」归因于《Hoppers》表现相对不佳。该片制作预算150 million，即1.5亿美元(约合人民币10亿元)，全球票房389.5 million，即3.895亿美元(约合人民币26亿元)；据TheWrap估算，距离收支平衡仍差一点。

paragraphs.en: Pixar has a mixture of sequels and original movies in the works, with 2027's Gatto to be followed by Incredibles 3 in 2028 and Coco 2 in 2029. A third film in the Monster Inc. series is also reported to be in early development.
paragraphs.cn: 皮克斯正在同时开发续集与原创电影：2027年的《Gatto》之后，将于2028年推出《超人总动员3》，2029年推出《寻梦环游记2》。据报《怪兽电力公司》系列第三部电影也处于早期开发阶段。

paragraphs.en: Going forward, however, it's reported that Pixar understands it must now make its films at a more affordable price — particularly those not part of existing franchises. This makes sense when you consider the studio's recent hits have been franchise films (Toy Story 5, Inside Out 2), while original stories (Hoppers, Elio, Elemental) have barely broken even, or made a loss.
paragraphs.cn: 不过据报，皮克斯已经意识到今后必须以更低成本制作电影，尤其是非现有系列作品。考虑到工作室近期成功作品都是系列电影（《玩具总动员5》《头脑特工队2》），而原创故事（《Hoppers》《地球特派员》《疯狂元素城》）不是勉强回本就是亏损，这种策略并不意外。

opus_summary: 迪士尼裁减数百名员工，皮克斯遭遇2024年以来最大规模裁员。据报原因之一是原创电影《Hoppers》表现不佳。面对原创作品频繁难以回本，皮克斯今后将特别控制非系列电影的制作成本。
